leadText: Flame Body (Japanese: ほのおのからだ Flame Body) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , there is a 1/3 chance that the attacking Pokémon will become burned . If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit has an independent chance to activate this Ability. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] The chance for Flame Body to burn is lowered to 30%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Pokémon Emerald onward, if a Pokémon with Flame Body is in the party (even if fainted ), the number of cycles it takes for all Pokémon Eggs in the party to hatch are halved. This effect does not stack with itself, Magma Armor , or Steam Engine ; however, it can be stacked with Hatching Power Pass Power , O-Power , or Roto Hatch .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , there is a 1/3 chance that the attacking Pokémon will become burned . If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit has an independent chance to activate this Ability. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] The chance for Flame Body to burn is lowered to 30%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Afflicts attackers with burns. MD T D S Burns an attacker who lands a direct-contact attack. B S L こうげきしてきた ポケモンを やけどじょうたいに する Conq. Contact with the Pokémon may burn the attacker. MD GtI May inflict the Burn status condition on the attacker who hits it with a direct attack. * When the Pokémon is hit with a direct attack like Tackle or Scratch, the attacker is sometimes afflicted with the Burn status condition! * S MD When the Pokémon is hit with a contact move like Tackle or Scratch, the attacker can be left with a burn! It also burns thrown items, but it doesn't block moves. MD RT DX When the Pokémon is hit with a contact move, like Tackle or Scratch, the attacker can be left with a Burn. This Ability also burns items thrown at the Pokémon.
